case_title: RON I BOSIA VS. SHINE-N-SEAL EXPRESS

MINUTES FOR JUN-08-2022 9:00 AM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BOSIA, RON I RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SHINE-N-SEAL EXPRESS $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00 SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,144.95 FILED BY BOSIA, RON I AS TO DEFENDANT SHINE-N-SEAL EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-04-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RON I BOSIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHINE-N-SEAL EXPRESS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TRAVER GILES (MANAGER /OPERATOR). PROOF OF SERVICE FOUND IMPROPER DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE, ACKNOWLEDGE THE PROPER AGENT OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF RON I BOSIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHINE-N-SEAL IS PRESENT EXPRESS REPRESENTED BY JEFF DOMICH, OPERATIONS. DEFENDANT SHINE-N-SEAL IS PRESENT EXPRESS C/O JOSEPH HARNEY IS PRESENT (JOSEPH HARNEY IS THE AGENT OF SERVICE FOR PLAINTIFF)REPRESENTED BY TRAVER GILES, MANAGING PARTNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSIA, RON I AS TO DEFENDANT SHINE-N-SEAL EXPRESS
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,144.95 *AGENT OF SERVICE ADDRESS HAS CHANGED* FILED BY BOSIA, RON I AS TO DEFENDANT SHINE-N-SEAL EXPRESS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-01-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE RETURNED CERTIFIED PROOF OF SERVICE, WHICH WAS SERVED TO: ERIC OR MANAGER, SHINE-N-SEAL, 367 BAYSHORE BLVD., SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, FILED ON OCTOBER 6, 2021, IS VALID. NO FURTHER PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED BY PLAINTIFF DUE TO THE VALIDITY OF THE ORIGINAL PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON OCTOBER 6, 2021. IF DEFENDANT SHINE-N-SEAL EXPRESS IS NOT PRESENT AT THE NEXT HEARING THIS MATTER WILL MOVE FORWARD WITH HEARING AS BEING UNCONTESTED. PLAINTIFF RON I BOSIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHINE-N-SEAL EXPRESS IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOSIA, RON I RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHINE-N-SEAL EXPRESS $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
